DocumentationPatterns

Patterns

Practical composition patterns for unitone-css.

Use this page as a reference when a layout can be solved by combining multiple primitives, and when you want to avoid unnecessary custom CSS, ad-hoc utility classes, or direct overrides on primitives.

For screenshot-to-code work, do not start by copying the nearest-looking example blindly. First identify the structural pattern, then choose the closest section below.

How To Read This Page

Use this order before jumping into a specific example:

  1. Decide the dominant relationship: stack, split, grid, layer, or float
  2. Decide which primitive should own width: usually Container, Center, Cover, Layers, or Text
  3. Decide whether overlap is real: if yes, inspect Layers patterns before spacing-based alternatives
  4. Decide the repeated unit: rows, cards, chips, buttons, media tiles, or prose blocks

Quick Pattern Map

Use these mappings as a fast index into this page.

Visual patternStart hereCompare with
Centered heroPage HeroLayered Hero
Hero with actionsHero With Action ButtonsCentered CTA Section
News or announcement rowsAnnouncement ListSidebar Layout
Repeated cardsCard GridFeature List
Header with left and right actionsHeader BarButton Group
Large two-column split that collapses to one columnSplit Media And TextSidebar Layout
Cards with aligned media ratiosCard Grid With Uniform MediaCard Grid
Title and supporting text in a centered sectionCentered Title SectionText Content Block
Title plus actions in a centered sectionCentered CTA SectionHero With Action Buttons
Article introArticle HeaderText Content Block
Long-form readable contentText Content BlockArticle Header
Form label + field rowForm RowSidebar Layout
Horizontal action setButton GroupBadge / Label Cluster
Wrapping badges or tagsBadge / Label ClusterButton Group
Horizontally scrollable items without wrappingHorizontal ReelBadge / Label Cluster
Decorated surface around another primitiveDecorated Surface BlockCentered CTA Section
Decorative background behind contentSection With Decorative BackgroundLayered Hero
Real overlap with background mediaLayered HeroSection With Decorative Background

Selection Notes

BothSides vs WithSidebar

Use BothSides when both sides are peers. Use WithSidebar when one side is clearly secondary, such as metadata, labels, or supporting media.

Cover vs Layers

Use Cover when the structure is mainly vertical distribution. Use Layers when overlap itself is part of the composition.

ResponsiveGrid vs Switcher

Use ResponsiveGrid when repeated cards are the main pattern. Use Switcher when a small set of larger items primarily needs split-to-stack behavior.

Text as width owner

Text is not a neutral wrapper. Use it when readable measure is intended, not by default for heroes or wide panels.

Page Hero

A first-view section with a large headline, supporting text, and enough surrounding space to establish visual hierarchy.

Clouds floated across the sky.

Moonlight drifted through the clouds and softened the quiet trees.

<div data-unitone-layout="cover -padding:0" style="--unitone--min-height: max(100svh, 667px)">
	<div data-unitone-layout="cover-content -valign:center">
		<div data-unitone-layout="container">
			<div data-unitone-layout="stack -gap:3">
				<div data-unitone-layout="center">
					<h2 data-unitone-layout="-fluid-typography" class="-font-size:4xl" style="font-weight: bold">Clouds floated across the sky.</h2>
				</div>
 
				<div data-unitone-layout="center">
					<p data-unitone-layout="-fluid-typography" class="-font-size:xl">Moonlight drifted through the clouds and softened the quiet trees.</p>
				</div>
			</div>
		</div>
	</div>
</div>
import { Cover, CoverContent } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/cover/react';
import { Container } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/container/react';
import { Stack } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/stack/react';
import { Center } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/center/react';
 
<Cover minHeight="max(100svh, 667px)" padding="0">
	<CoverContent valign="center">
		<Container>
			<Stack gap="3">
				<Center>
					<h2 data-unitone-layout="-fluid-typography" className="-font-size:4xl" style={{fontWeight: 'bold'}}>Clouds floated across the sky.</h2>
				</Center>
 
				<Center>
					<p data-unitone-layout="-fluid-typography" className="-font-size:xl">Moonlight drifted through the clouds and softened the quiet trees.</p>
				</Center>
			</Stack>
		</Container>
	</CoverContent>
</Cover>

Hero With Action Buttons

A hero block that places one or more call-to-action buttons below the main copy while keeping the text flow readable on small screens.

Clouds floated across the sky.

Moonlight drifted through the clouds and softened the quiet trees.

Download now
Try it online
<div data-unitone-layout="cover -padding:0" style="--unitone--min-height: max(100svh, 667px)">
	<div data-unitone-layout="cover-content -valign:center">
		<div data-unitone-layout="container">
			<div data-unitone-layout="stack -gap:3">
				<div data-unitone-layout="center">
					<h2 data-unitone-layout="-fluid-typography" class="-font-size:4xl" style="font-weight: bold">Clouds floated across the sky.</h2>
				</div>
 
				<div data-unitone-layout="center">
					<p data-unitone-layout="-fluid-typography" class="-font-size:xl">Moonlight drifted through the clouds and softened the quiet trees.</p>
				</div>
 
				<div data-unitone-layout="center">
					<div data-unitone-layout="cluster">
						<div>
							<a href="#" class="-display:inline-flex -border-radius -background-color:heavy-violet -color:white -padding-block:-2 -padding-inline:-1" style="width: 100%"><strong>Download now</strong></a>
						</div>
						<div>
							<a href="#" class="-display:inline-flex -border-radius -background-color:heavy-violet -color:white -padding-block:-2 -padding-inline:-1" style="width: 100%"><strong>Try it online</strong></a>
						</div>
					</div>
				</div>
			</div>
		</div>
	</div>
</div>
import { Cover, CoverContent } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/cover/react';
import { Container } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/container/react';
import { Stack } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/stack/react';
import { Center } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/center/react';
import { Cluster } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/cluster/react';
 
<Cover minHeight="max(100svh, 667px)" padding="0">
	<CoverContent valign="center">
		<Container>
			<Stack gap="3">
				<Center>
					<h2 data-unitone-layout="-fluid-typography" className="-font-size:4xl" style={{fontWeight: 'bold'}}>Clouds floated across the sky.</h2>
				</Center>
 
				<Center>
					<p data-unitone-layout="-fluid-typography" className="-font-size:xl">Moonlight drifted through the clouds and softened the quiet trees.</p>
				</Center>
 
				<Center>
					<Cluster>
						<div>
							<a href="#" className="-display:inline-flex -border-radius -background-color:heavy-violet -color:white -padding-block:-2 -padding-inline:-1" style={{width: '100%'}}><strong>Download now</strong></a>
						</div>
						<div>
							<a href="#" className="-display:inline-flex -border-radius -background-color:heavy-violet -color:white -padding-block:-2 -padding-inline:-1" style={{width: '100%'}}><strong>Try it online</strong></a>
						</div>
					</Cluster>
				</Center>
			</Stack>
		</Container>
	</CoverContent>
</Cover>

Announcement List

A section with a heading and a vertical list of updates, where each item usually contains metadata such as a date and a short release note or title.

News

April 17, 2026
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet
April 17, 2026
Consectetur adipisicing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua
April 17, 2026
Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation
<div data-unitone-layout="decorator">
	<div data-unitone-layout="gutters">
		<div data-unitone-layout="container">
			<div data-unitone-layout="stack">
				<div data-unitone-layout="center" style="--unitone--maxWidth: 100%">
					<h2 data-unitone-layout="-fluid-typography" class="-font-size:3xl" style="font-weight: bold">Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet</h2>
				</div>
 
				<div data-unitone-layout="stack -gap:-1">
					<div data-unitone-layout="with-sidebar -row-gap:-2 -sidebar:left">
						<div class="-font-size:s">April 17, 2026</div>
						<div>Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet</div>
					</div>
					<div data-unitone-layout="with-sidebar -row-gap:-2 -sidebar:left">
						<div class="-font-size:s">April 17, 2026</div>
						<div>Consectetur adipisicing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua</div>
					</div>
					<div data-unitone-layout="with-sidebar -row-gap:-2 -sidebar:left">
						<div class="-font-size:s">April 17, 2026</div>
						<div>Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation</div>
					</div>
				</div>
			</div>
		</div>
	</div>
</div>
import { Decorator } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/decorator/react';
import { Gutters } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/gutters/react';
import { Container } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/container/react';
import { Stack } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/stack/react';
import { Center } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/center/react';
import { Text } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/text/react';
import { WithSidebar } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/with-sidebar/react';
 
<Decorator>
	<Gutters>
		<Container>
			<Stack>
				<Center maxWidth="100%">
					<h2 data-unitone-layout="-fluid-typography" className="-font-size:3xl" style={{fontWeight: 'bold'}}>News</h2>
				</Center>
 
				<Stack gap="-1">
					<WithSidebar sidebar="left" rowGap="-2">
						<div className="-font-size:s">April 17, 2026</div>
						<div>Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet</div>
					</WithSidebar>
					<WithSidebar sidebar="left" rowGap="-2">
						<div className="-font-size:s">April 17, 2026</div>
						<div>Consectetur adipisicing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua</div>
					</WithSidebar>
					<WithSidebar sidebar="left" rowGap="-2">
						<div className="-font-size:s">April 17, 2026</div>
						<div>Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation</div>
					</WithSidebar>
				</Stack>
			</Stack>
		</Container>
	</Gutters>
</Decorator>

Header Bar

A compact top bar that places two elements at opposite ends, such as a logo on the left and a menu button on the right.

Use this pattern when the main requirement is to keep two items pulled apart with a clear start and end relationship, rather than building a sidebar-like split.

Logo

<div data-unitone-layout="both-sides -align-items:center">
	<div>
		Logo
	</div>
	<div>
		<button class="-display:flex -flex-direction:column -justify-content:space-between" style="height: 1rem; width: 1rem;">
			<span class="-display:block -background-color:text" style="height: 1px"></span>
			<span class="-display:block -background-color:text" style="height: 1px"></span>
			<span class="-display:block -background-color:text" style="height: 1px"></span>
		</button>
	</div>
</div>
import { BothSides } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/both-sides/react';
 
<BothSides alignItems="center">
	<div>
		Logo
	</div>
	<div>
		<button className="-display:flex -flex-direction:column -justify-content:space-between" style={{height: '1rem', width: '1rem'}}>
			<span className="-display:block -background-color:text" style={{height: '1px'}}></span>
			<span className="-display:block -background-color:text" style={{height: '1px'}}></span>
			<span className="-display:block -background-color:text" style={{height: '1px'}}></span>
		</button>
	</div>
</BothSides>

Split Media And Text

A large two-column composition where media and text sit side by side with similar visual weight, then collapse to a single column on smaller screens.

Use this pattern when both sides should feel like major sections of the layout, such as an image on one side and explanatory copy on the other.

Sand and Stars

Stars fell over the silent desert. The wind lifted grains of sand, making them shimmer like tiny lights. The moon cast its glow, stretching far into the distance.

In the quiet night, only the sand and stars remained, patiently marking time.

<div data-unitone-layout="switcher -align-items:center">
	<div>
		<div data-unitone-layout="-frame" style="--unitone--ratio: 3/4">
			<img src="..." alt="" />
		</div>
	</div>
	<div>
		<div data-unitone-layout="text -gap">
			<h2>Sand and Stars</h2>
			<p>Stars fell over the silent desert. The wind lifted grains of sand, making them shimmer like tiny lights. The moon cast its glow, stretching far into the distance.</p>
			<p>In the quiet night, only the sand and stars remained, patiently marking time.</p>
		</div>
	</div>
</div>
import { Switcher } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/switcher/react';
import { Frame } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/frame/react';
 
<Switcher alignItems="center">
	<div>
		<Frame ratio="3/4">
			<img src="..." alt="" />
		</Frame>
	</div>
	<div>
		<Text applyGap>
			<h2>Sand and Stars</h2>
			<p>Stars fell over the silent desert. The wind lifted grains of sand, making them shimmer like tiny lights. The moon cast its glow, stretching far into the distance.</p>
			<p>In the quiet night, only the sand and stars remained, patiently marking time.</p>
		</div>
	</Text>
</Switcher>

Card Grid

A collection of repeated cards that wrap into responsive columns without relying on media-query-specific breakpoint layouts.

import { ResponsiveGrid } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/rsponsive-grid/react';
import { Stack } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/stack/react';
 
<ResponsiveGrid>
	<Stack gap="-1">
		<h3 className="-font-size:l" style={{fontWeight: 'bold'}}>Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet</h3>
		<p>Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipisicing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.</p>
	</Stack>
	<Stack gap="-1">
		<h3 className="-font-size:l" style={{fontWeight: 'bold'}}>Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet</h3>
		<p>Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipisicing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.</p>
	</Stack>
	<Stack gap="-1">
		<h3 className="-font-size:l" style={{fontWeight: 'bold'}}>Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet</h3>
		<p>Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipisicing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.</p>
	</Stack>
</ResponsiveGrid>

Card Grid With Uniform Media

A repeated card grid where each card includes an image or video that should maintain a consistent aspect ratio across the set.

Use this pattern when media alignment is part of the visual rhythm, such as article cards, product cards, or gallery-like listings.

import { ResponsiveGrid } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/rsponsive-grid/react';
import { Stack } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/stack/react';
import { Frame } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/frame/react';
 
<ResponsiveGrid>
	<Stack gap="-1">
		<Frame ratio="4/3">
			<img src="..." alt="" />
		</Frame>
		<h3 className="-font-size:l" style={{fontWeight: 'bold'}}>Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet</h3>
		<p>Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipisicing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.</p>
	</Stack>
	<Stack gap="-1">
		<Frame ratio="4/3">
			<img src="..." alt="" />
		</Frame>
		<h3 className="-font-size:l" style={{fontWeight: 'bold'}}>Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet</h3>
		<p>Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipisicing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.</p>

		<Frame ratio="4/3">

Feature List

A vertical or grid-based list of short feature descriptions, often combining a small heading, supporting text, and optional icon-like decoration.

				<svg>...</svg>

</div>
import { ResponsiveGrid } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/rsponsive-grid/react';
import { Stack } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/stack/react';
import { WithSidebar } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/with-sidebar/react';
 
<ResponsiveGrid>
	<Stack gap="-1">
		<WithSidebar gap="-2" sidebar="left">
			<div style={{marginTop: 'calc((1lh - 1.3em) / 2)'}}>
				<svg>...</svg>
			</div>
			<h3 className="-font-size:l" style={{fontWeight: 'bold'}}>Lorem ipsum dolor sit</h3>
		</WithSidebar>
		<p>Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipisicing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.</p>
	</Stack>
	<Stack gap="-1">
		<WithSidebar gap="-2" sidebar="left">
			<div style={{marginTop: 'calc((1lh - 1.3em) / 2)'}}>
				<svg>...</svg>
			</div>
			<h3 className="-font-size:l" style={{fontWeight: 'bold'}}>Lorem ipsum dolor sit</h3>
		</WithSidebar>
		<p>Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipisicing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.</p>
	</Stack>
</ResponsiveGrid>

Sidebar Layout

  • Item: A
  • Item: B
  • Item: C

import { Decorator } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/decorator/react';
import { Gutters } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/gutters/react';
import { Container } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/container/react';
import { Stack } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/stack/react';
import { Center } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/center/react';
import { Text } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/text/react';
 
<Decorator>
	<Gutters>
		<Container>
			<Stack>
				<Center maxWidth="100%">
					<h2 data-unitone-layout="-fluid-typography" className="-font-size:3xl" style={{fontWeight: 'bold'}}>Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet</h2>
				</Center>
 
				<Text applyGap maxWidth="100%">
					<p>Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipisicing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea commodo consequat. Duis aute irure dolor in reprehenderit in voluptate velit esse cill</p>
				</Text>
			</Stack>
		</Container>
	</Gutters>
</Decorator>

import { Decorator } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/decorator/react';
import { Gutters } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/gutters/react';
import { Container } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/container/react';
import { Stack } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/stack/react';
import { Center } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/center/react';
import { Cluster } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/cluster/react';
 
<Decorator>
	<Gutters>
		<Container>
			<Stack>
				<Center withText>
					<h2 data-unitone-layout="-fluid-typography" className="-font-size:5xl" style={{fontWeight: 'bold'}}>Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet</h2>
				</Center>
 
				<Center>
					<p>Consectetur adipisicing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.</p>
				</Center>
 
				<Center>
					<Cluster>
						<div>
							<a href="#" className="-display:inline-flex -border-radius -background-color:heavy-violet -color:white -padding-block:-2 -padding-inline:-1" style={{width: '100%'}}><strong>Download now</strong></a>
						</div>
						<div>
							<a href="#" className="-display:inline-flex -border-radius -background-color:heavy-violet -color:white -padding-block:-2 -padding-inline:-1" style={{width: '100%'}}><strong>Try it online</strong></a>
						</div>
					</Cluster>
				</Center>
			</Stack>
		</Container>
	</Gutters>
</Decorator>

Article Header

A top section for an article or post that combines title, metadata, summary, and sometimes category or author information in a readable hierarchy.

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet

Short summary line

inc2734
April 17, 2026
6min read
<div data-unitone-layout="decorator">
	<div data-unitone-layout="gutters -padding:2">
		<div data-unitone-layout="container">
			<div data-unitone-layout="stack -gap:1">
				<hgroup data-unitone-layout="stack -gap:-2">
					<h1 data-unitone-layout="-fluid-typography" class="-font-size:3xl" style="font-weight: bold">Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet</h1>
					<p style="font-weight: bold">Short summary line</p>
				</hgroup>
 
				<div data-unitone-layout="cluster -gap:-1 -divider:slash">
					<div>inc2734</div>
					<div>April 17, 2026</div>
					<div>6min read</div>
				</div>
			</div>
		</div>
	</div>
</div>
import { Decorator } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/decorator/react';
import { Gutters } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/gutters/react';
import { Container } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/container/react';
import { Stack } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/stack/react';
import { Cluster } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/cluster/react';
 
<Decorator>
	<Gutters padding="2">
		<Container>
			<Stack gap="1">
				<Stack tagName="hgroup" gap="-2">
					<h1 data-unitone-layout="-fluid-typography" className="-font-size:3xl"  style={{fontWeight: 'bold'}}>Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet</h1>
					<p style={{fontWeight: 'bold'}}>Short summary line</p>
				</Stack>
 
				<Cluster gap="-1" divider="slash">
					<div>inc2734</div>
					<div>April 17, 2026</div>
					<div>6min read</div>
				</Cluster>
			</Stack>
		</Container>
	</Gutters>
</Decorator>

Badge / Label Cluster

A small group of badges, tags, or labels that should line up horizontally, wrap naturally, and remain visually balanced.

Item AItem BItem C

Horizontal Reel

A row of items that should stay on one line and remain accessible by horizontal scrolling instead of wrapping.

Use this pattern when content would otherwise be clipped or awkwardly wrapped, such as logo rails, compact card sliders, chip lists, or narrow-screen control rows.

<div data-unitone-layout="reel -no-bar">
	<img src="..." alt="" />
	<img src="..." alt="" />
	<img src="..." alt="" />
	<img src="..." alt="" />
	<img src="..." alt="" />
</div>
import { Reel } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/reel/react';
 
<Reel noBar>
	<img src="..." alt="" />
	<img src="..." alt="" />
	<img src="..." alt="" />
	<img src="..." alt="" />
	<img src="..." alt="" />
</Reel>

Decorated Surface Block

A block where one primitive handles structure and Decorator provides the visual surface, such as padding, background, border radius, border, or shadow.

Use this pattern when you want to style a section, card, callout, or panel without weakening the meaning of the underlying primitive composition.

import { Decorator } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/decorator/react';
import { Stack } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/stack/react';
import { Center } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/center/react';
import { Cluster } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/cluster/react';
 
<Decorator backgroundColor="var(--unitone--color--background-alt)" color="var(--unitone--color--text-alt)" borderRadius="var(--unitone--global--border-radius)" padding="1s">
	<Stack>
		<Center withText>
			<h2 data-unitone-layout="-fluid-typography" className="-font-size:3xl" style={{fontWeight: 'bold'}}>Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet</h2>
		</Center>
 
		<Center>
			<p>Consectetur adipisicing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.</p>
		</Center>
 
		<Center>
			<Cluster>
				<div>
					<a href="#" className="-display:inline-flex -border-radius -background-color:heavy-violet -color:white -padding-block:-2 -padding-inline:-1" style={{width: '100%'}}><strong>Download now</strong></a>
				</div>
				<div>
					<a href="#" className="-display:inline-flex -border-radius -background-color:heavy-violet -color:white -padding-block:-2 -padding-inline:-1" style={{width: '100%'}}><strong>Try it online</strong></a>
				</div>
			</Cluster>
		</Center>
	</Stack>
</Decorator>

Dialog Content Layout

An internal dialog structure that separates heading, body, and actions so modal content remains readable and easy to scan.

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet

The content of the Dialog.

<div data-unitone-layout="dialog">
	<div data-unitone-layout="dialog-trigger">
		<button command="show-modal" commandfor="dialog-example-content" className="-display:inline-flex -border-radius -background-color:heavy-violet -color:white -padding-block:-2 -padding-inline:-1">
			Open dialog
		</button>
	</div>
	<dialog
		id="dialog-example-content"
		data-unitone-layout="dialog-content"
		closedby="any"
	>
		<div data-unitone-layout="decorator -gap:1 -padding:1s" style="--unitone--background--color: var(--unitone--color--background)">
			<div data-unitone-layout="stack">
				<h2 data-unitone-layout="-fluid-typography" class="-font-size:xl" style="font-weight: bold">Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet</h2>
				<p>The content of the Dialog.</p>
				<div>
					<button command="request-close" commandfor="dialog-example-content" class="-display:inline-flex -border-radius -background-color:heavy-violet -color:white -padding-block:-2 -padding-inline:-1">
						Close
					</button>
				</div>
			</div>
		</div>
	</dialog>
</div>
import {
  Dialog,
  DialogTrigger,
  DialogContent,
} from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/dialog/react';
 
import { Decorator } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/decorator/react';
import { Stack } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/stack/react';
 
<Dialog>
	<DialogTrigger>
		<button command="show-modal" commandfor="dialog-example-content" className="-display:inline-flex -border-radius -background-color:heavy-violet -color:white -padding-block:-2 -padding-inline:-1">
			Open dialog
		</button>
	</DialogTrigger>
	<DialogContent id="dialog-example-content">
		<Decorator backgroundColor="var(--unitone--color--background)" gap="1" padding="1s">
			<Stack>
				<h2 data-unitone-layout="-fluid-typography" className="-font-size:xl" style={{fontWeight: 'bold'}}>Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet</h2>
				<p>The content of the Dialog.</p>
				<div>
					<button command="request-close" commandfor="dialog-example-content" className="-display:inline-flex -border-radius -background-color:heavy-violet -color:white -padding-block:-2 -padding-inline:-1">
						Close
					</button>
				</div>
			</Stack>
		</Decorator>
	</DialogContent>
</Dialog>

Popover Content Layout

A compact floating panel layout for short navigation, metadata, or actions where spacing and grouping matter more than large-scale composition.

The content of the Popover.

<div data-unitone-layout="popover">
	<div data-unitone-layout="popover-trigger">
		<button popovertarget="popover-example-content" className="-display:inline-flex -border-radius -background-color:heavy-violet -color:white -padding-block:-2 -padding-inline:-1">>Open popover</button>
	</div>
	<div
		id="popover-example-content"
		data-unitone-layout="popover-content"
		popover
	>
			<div data-unitone-layout="decorator -padding:-1" style="--unitone--background-color: var(--unitone--color--pale-gray)">
				<div data-unitone-layout="stack -gap:-2 -divider:divide" style="--unitone--divider-color: var(--unitone--color--light-gray)">
					<p>The content of the Popover.</p>
					<div>
						<button className="-display:inline-flex -border-radius -background-color:heavy-violet -color:white -padding-block:-2 -padding-inline:-1">Open popover</button>
					</div>
				</div>
			</div>
	</div>
</div>
import {
	Popover,
	PopoverTrigger,
	PopoverContent,
} from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/popover/react';
 
import { Decorator } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/decorator/react';
import { Stack } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/stack/react';
 
<Popover>
	<PopoverTrigger>
		<button popoverTarget="popover-example-content" className="-display:inline-flex -border-radius -background-color:heavy-violet -color:white -padding-block:-2 -padding-inline:-1">Open popover</button>
	</PopoverTrigger>
	<PopoverContent id="popover-example-content">
		<PopoverContent id="popover-example-content">
			<Decorator backgroundColor="var(--unitone--color--pale-gray)" padding="-1">
				<Stack gap="-2" divider="divide" dividerColor="var(--unitone--color--light-gray)">
					<p>The content of the Popover.</p>
					<div>
						<button className="-display:inline-flex -border-radius -background-color:heavy-violet -color:white -padding-block:-2 -padding-inline:-1">Open popover</button>
					</div>
				</Stack>
			</Decorator>
		</PopoverContent>
	</PopoverContent>
</Popover>

Section With Decorative Background

A content section where the main structure is built with primitives, while decorative background treatment is layered behind or around the content.

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet

Consectetur adipisicing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.

Try it online
<div data-unitone-layout="layers -cover">
	<img src="..." alt="" />
 
	<div data-unitone-layout="decorator -position:relative">
		<div data-unitone-layout="gutters">
			<div data-unitone-layout="container">
				<div data-unitone-layout="stack">
					<div data-unitone-layout="center -with-text">
						<h2 data-unitone-layout="-fluid-typography" class="-font-size:5xl" style="font-weight: bold">Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet</h2>
					</div>
 
					<div data-unitone-layout="center">
						<p>Consectetur adipisicing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.</p>
					</div>
 
					<div data-unitone-layout="center">
						<div data-unitone-layout="cluster">
							<div>
								<a href="#" class="-display:inline-flex -border-radius -background-color:heavy-violet -color:white -padding-block:-2 -padding-inline:-1" style="width: 100%"><strong>Download now</strong></a>
							</div>
							<div>
								<a href="#" class="-display:inline-flex -border-radius -background-color:heavy-violet -color:white -padding-block:-2 -padding-inline:-1" style="width: 100%"><strong>Try it online</strong></a>
							</div>
						</div>
					</div>
				</div>
			</div>
		</div>
	</div>
</div>
import { Layers } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/layers/react';
import { Decorator } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/decorator/react';
import { Gutters } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/gutters/react';
import { Container } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/container/react';
import { Stack } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/stack/react';
import { Center } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/center/react';
import { Cluster } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/cluster/react';
 
<Layers cover>
	<img src="..." alt="" />
 
	<Decorator position="relative">
		<Gutters>
			<Container>
				<Stack>
					<Center withText>
						<h2 data-unitone-layout="-fluid-typography" className="-font-size:5xl" style={{fontWeight: 'bold'}}>Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet</h2>
					</Center>
 
					<Center>
						<p>Consectetur adipisicing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.</p>
					</Center>
 
					<Center>
						<Cluster>
							<div>
								<a href="#" className="-display:inline-flex -border-radius -background-color:heavy-violet -color:white -padding-block:-2 -padding-inline:-1" style={{width: '100%'}}><strong>Download now</strong></a>
							</div>
							<div>
								<a href="#" className="-display:inline-flex -border-radius -background-color:heavy-violet -color:white -padding-block:-2 -padding-inline:-1" style={{width: '100%'}}><strong>Try it online</strong></a>
							</div>
						</Cluster>
					</Center>
				</Stack>
			</Container>
		</Gutters>
	</Decorator>
</Layers>

Layered Hero

A hero layout that combines foreground content and background visual elements in overlapping layers, while keeping the readable content structure separate.

Clouds floated across the sky.

Moonlight drifted through the clouds and softened the quiet trees.

<div data-unitone-layout="layers -cover">
	<img src="..." alt="" />
 
	<div data-unitone-layout="cover -padding:0" style="--unitone--min-height: max(100svh, 667px)">
		<div data-unitone-layout="cover-content -valign:center">
			<div data-unitone-layout="container">
				<div data-unitone-layout="stack -gap:3">
					<div data-unitone-layout="center">
						<h2 data-unitone-layout="-fluid-typography" class="-font-size:4xl" style="font-weight: bold">Clouds floated across the sky.</h2>
					</div>
 
					<div data-unitone-layout="center">
						<p data-unitone-layout="-fluid-typography" class="-font-size:xl">Moonlight drifted through the clouds and softened the quiet trees.</p>
					</div>
 
					<div data-unitone-layout="center">
						<div data-unitone-layout="cluster">
							<div>
								<a href="#" class="-display:inline-flex -border-radius -background-color:heavy-violet -color:white -padding-block:-2 -padding-inline:-1" style="width: 100%"><strong>Download now</strong></a>
							</div>
							<div>
								<a href="#" class="-display:inline-flex -border-radius -background-color:heavy-violet -color:white -padding-block:-2 -padding-inline:-1" style="width: 100%"><strong>Try it online</strong></a>
							</div>
						</div>
					</div>
				</div>
			</div>
		</div>
	</div>
</div>
import { Layers } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/layers/react';
import { Cover, CoverContent } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/cover/react';
import { Container } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/container/react';
import { Stack } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/stack/react';
import { Center } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/center/react';
import { Cluster } from '@inc2734/unitone-css/layout-primitives/cluster/react';
 
<Layers cover>
	<img src="..." alt="" />
 
	<Cover minHeight="max(100svh, 667px)" padding="0">
		<CoverContent valign="center">
			<Container>
				<Stack gap="3">
					<Center>
						<h2 data-unitone-layout="-fluid-typography" className="-font-size:4xl" style={{fontWeight: 'bold'}}>Clouds floated across the sky.</h2>
					</Center>
 
					<Center>
						<p data-unitone-layout="-fluid-typography" className="-font-size:xl">Moonlight drifted through the clouds and softened the quiet trees.</p>
					</Center>
 
					<Center>
						<Cluster>
							<div>
								<a href="#" className="-display:inline-flex -border-radius -background-color:heavy-violet -color:white -padding-block:-2 -padding-inline:-1" style={{width: '100%'}}><strong>Download now</strong></a>
							</div>
							<div>
								<a href="#" className="-display:inline-flex -border-radius -background-color:heavy-violet -color:white -padding-block:-2 -padding-inline:-1" style={{width: '100%'}}><strong>Try it online</strong></a>
							</div>
						</Cluster>
					</Center>
				</Stack>
			</Container>
		</CoverContent>
	</Cover>
</Layers>
